title: DL Mini-Project: Text Classification App End-to-End
content:
### Day 160: DL Mini-Project: Text Classification App End-to-End

NLP enables machines to understand text. The field has shifted from bag-of-words to transformers and pretrained models.

**Key Concepts:**
- **DL Mini-Project:** Study this concept deeply — learn the syntax, see real-world examples, and practice writing code for it.
- **Text Classification App End-to-End:** Study this concept deeply — learn the syntax, see real-world examples, and practice writing code for it.

**Today's Focus:**
- Study each concept with hands-on practice
- Write working code examples
- Connect to real-world applications
- Think about how this would be tested in an interview
